# ai-agents/langgraph/deep/backend/router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:02Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/webllm-agent · WebLLM + CDP + RAG + LangGraph integration.

- from `__future__` import annotations

- from `cdp_manager` import CDPManager

## Inputs

## Process
### Functions
- `async ws_endpoint(ws)`: Browser connects · backend pushes prompts → WebLLM → response.
- `async run_agent(body, request)`: Trigger LangGraph DAG · uses connected WebLLM via bridge.
- `async health()`: Self-check · per §47.8 readiness probe.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Fallback path: run without CDP · operator wants browser-action capable
- but degradation is acceptable for read-only use cases
